title: Beamforming
description: Light-based transportation mod for Modfest: Singularity
body:
A proof-of-concept transportation mod built around light from beacon beams. Place a Prism above a beacon beam, and stand under it to be teleported to the destination of the Prism. Subject to change!

Not survival-ready! (no loot tables, recipes, cooldowns, range limits)

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)
